positive: An overhead view of a minimalist celestial constellation map, featuring glowing neon-blue and gold line art depicting mythical beasts and zodiac patterns, set against a deep midnight indigo sky. The central subject is an ornate, stylized crescent moon and a shooting star trail, rendered with clean, thick silhouettes and glowing particle effects. Style should be ethereal, retro-futuristic, and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced. Dramatic volumetric lighting emphasizing the glow, high contrast between the vibrant lines and the dark background. Highly detailed, vector illustration quality.
